# Cinematic Website Builder

Complete workflow for creating a high-performance, visually stunning website with SEO optimization.

## Overview

This skill guides you through building a cinematic website from setup to launch, covering:
- Project initialization and structure
- Visual/animation implementation
- SEO optimization
- Performance optimization
- Image optimization
- Sitemap and metadata

## Workflow Steps

### 1. Project Setup
- Choose framework (Astro, Next.js, or vanilla HTML/CSS)
- Initialize project with proper structure
- Set up build tools and dependencies
- Configure deployment settings

### 2. Visual & Animation Layer
- Implement CSS animations for cinematic feel
- Add scroll triggers (GSAP, Framer Motion)
- Create hero sections with parallax effects
- Optimize video backgrounds
- Use WebGL or Canvas for advanced effects

### 3. SEO Implementation
- Add meta tags and Open Graph tags
- Create XML sitemap
- Implement structured data (JSON-LD)
- Configure robots.txt
- Set up canonical URLs
- Optimize heading hierarchy

### 4. Performance Optimization
- Minimize CSS/JS bundles
- Enable image lazy-loading
- Implement code splitting
- Cache strategies
- CDN configuration
- Core Web Vitals optimization

### 5. Image & Media Optimization
- Use modern formats (WebP, AVIF)
- Implement responsive images
- Compress and resize appropriately
- Add alt text for accessibility

### 6. Testing & Launch
- Performance audits (Lighthouse)
- SEO checks
- Cross-browser testing
- Mobile responsiveness
- Accessibility audit

## Key Considerations

- **Performance First**: Cinematic effects should not impact Core Web Vitals
- **SEO Priority**: Ensure all content is crawlable and indexable
- **Accessibility**: All animations should have reduced-motion alternatives
- **Mobile**: Test extensively on mobile devices
- **Analytics**: Track performance metrics post-launch



- `.github/templates/cinematic-html.template` - HTML boilerplate
- `.github/templates/animations.css` - Animation presets
- `.github/templates/seo-checklist.md` - SEO verification checklist
